title: ImmersiveMC - IMC2
description: Fabric 1.21.1 | Vanilla+ mods | Better performance | Several shaders included!
body:
![Bisect Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bab445b70d606b96245d2dcb0fe9756d1f09c69.webp)
### [Use our code " withrage " to get 25% discount!](https://bisecthosting.com/withrage)
![ImmersiveMC Vanilla + (IMC2)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d0e464e99cd095b70b3986aa6cd5f56ae48bbd6.png)

**ImmersiveMC 2** revolutionizes your Minecraft experience with a perfect blend of enhanced performance, captivating visuals, and enriched gameplay. Designed to elevate both player and server performance to unprecedented levels, this meticulously curated modpack introduces a seamless fusion of optimization, shaders, and vanilla-inspired enhancements - **and all of this in version 1.21.1!**

## ✨ Also try out our new mods - Cozy Café alongside Cozy Ingredients!
We've recently released 2 new mods that are supposed to be used together, please try them out!

**[Cozy Café - A brand new food mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cozy-cafe-mod)**

**[Cozy Ingredients - A core library mod needed for Cozy Café](https://modrinth.com/mod/cozy-ingredients-mod)**

## ✨ Discover more of our projects on our website!
[![website image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64cc0402e80a62b192f8cd533228196a60a2714d.png)](https://withrage.com/)

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da87807526362b0b51a11216890c8a6231ef579a.png)

Immerse yourself in a world where lag and inefficiencies become a distant memory. By integrating performance-boosting mods, this modpack ensures smoother gameplay, allowing you to explore, build, and conquer with unparalleled fluidity. Say goodbye to interruptions and hello to uninterrupted adventures.



But the immersion doesn't stop there. With a selection of carefully chosen shaders, your Minecraft world transforms into a breathtaking masterpiece. Dive into vibrant landscapes, dynamic lighting, and immersive atmospheres that breathe life into every corner of your world.

![Shaders Off/On - Day Time](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32d0d596be6e9f013e932f1c1067b8d1e6a1a75f.png)

![Shaders Off/On - Night Time](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df786336804532a86bea6c0aec8292a6048c8ef0.png)

ImmersiveMC 2 doesn't just enhance performance and visuals; it enriches the very fabric of Minecraft itself. Embrace the spirit of exploration with Tectonic, a world generation mod that breathes new life into your landscapes, presenting you with awe-inspiring vistas and challenging terrain to conquer.

![Terrain Generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a72169b3512cf80104ba0ac1e12d533608c948a9.png)

Prepare to embark on an adventure like never before. Whether you're a seasoned explorer or a budding architect, ImmersiveMC 2 invites you to experience Minecraft in a whole new light. So, gather your resources, sharpen your tools, and step into a world where performance, aesthetics, and gameplay converge in perfect harmony.

If you need any help or have any suggestions for future updates, please join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/QwH2ZQa)!

## Mod links for attribution requirements:
**Stay True resource pack:** [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)
